textByHash.335ce37dfc77e074a6cee917ef446ed924cd5cea: Ah, I'm just keeping an eye on things and making sure nothing untoward happens.
textByHash.a18d5a459e98c655cd84829a091ffb7d8a4233b5: One day I hope it will be.
textByHash.7c802ecb7cf8e77d03330f4ab4b85e70d8ad82e5: Ah, you made it. Given recent events, that in itself is something for us to be thankful about.
textByHash.7c09da4749189f68aad32d2de780a50b1880a33d: Unfortunately so. We've already lost several of our brethren in recent days. Lucien's agents are only growing bolder.
textByHash.a9b6573189af65930a2bb0b8e3ab7fd8b09af418: You mean you do not know? Idria's message should have explained the situation.
textByHash.aaa1c782cd60a0a6fa655e9395dde2e719d62509: I see. In that case, I will explain what I can, but I will need to be brief.
textByHash.0a9965fe456dfdb0426cdb3844d63cb2964afe0b: Yes, of course. I will explain what I can, but I will need to be brief.
textByHash.de16da0f28c39b76c116ed79e058d8f13b34ff05: My name is Thaerisk Cemphier and I lead a group of Guthixians called Crux Eqal. Our duty is a straightforward one: To safeguard this world from the chaos of imbalance.
textByHash.8066de4c75beb29845e8daa41faa50aaa05862f2: Yes, it sadly does. However, our work is a necessity. Without those of us willing to do what must be done to protect this world, peace will never be more than a fantasy.
textByHash.24eae0c8439ca3575597e6d11924ceb1b43ad783: Now, while I do enjoy debating concepts such as these, we are getting sidetracked. Let's get back to the matter at hand.
textByHash.e5699e994c0d0b0b769b5b37641f8bae22308afd: Precisely. We have been keeping an eye on the Mahjarrat for some time. We consider many of them to be grave threats to the safety of our world.
textByHash.89863685c523a5cd345add1e849022653410e067: However, truth be told, until recently, we didn't consider Lucien to be among that number. All that changed when you came along.
textByHash.354a2befb5c29cf193f62fba00f730f21f6297eb: When you helped Lucien obtain the Staff of Armadyl, you set him on a path to unimaginable power. After all, Zamorak himself was once a Mahjarrat, until he used the Staff of Armadyl to attain godhood...
textByHash.442f1ddca286e678cbee626e25210a21b327b3e9: However, truth be told, until recently, we didn't consider Lucien to be among that number. All that changed when, despite your best attempts to stop him, he managed to obtain the Staff of Armadyl.
textByHash.2afc400acb6586fab0fafced958326c47705b75e: I'm afraid so, and with it, he is now on a path leading towards unimaginable power. After all, Zamorak himself was once a Mahjarrat, until he used the Staff of Armadyl to attain godhood...
textByHash.56671a2efcf306ed6061973a12fb4510e706c9f4: Hang on a moment. I hear someone approaching from downstairs. Let us wait for them to pass.
textByHash.8117a372579e2f1e686ddfa5ebaeb3959125614c: Yes, I think so, but that was far too close. We have been dealing with the threat of Lucien's assassins for some time now, but that's the first time they've attacked us here in Taverley.
textByHash.f76cbb0d3f28019041b177320087aa14356470dd: Perhaps he also sees you as a threat as well. You may have worked with him before, but I suspect that means little to someone like him.
textByHash.491dd3b705fd57d57ab3ce87b8acecbe389a8e3a: Who could say for sure, but it may not be a coincidence that his assassins attacked so soon after your arrival.
textByHash.d631b097311005071169d0169c4d27505c4c9595: Perhaps he also sees you as a threat as well. It may not be a coincidence that his assassins attacked so soon after your arrival.
textByHash.62cae1a2b22e2d81e55561a08681635cde6621ab: Regardless, this is another reminder that time is not on our side. We must find out what Lucien is planning and stop him before it's too late.
textByHash.f305674cb5e17526faa7dbd867cb9f19857f7a26: I realise that's easier said than done, but I believe we have what it takes to do so.
textByHash.d36ff2d057470e5dd81b1564bfbac6905b6407fb: We're still on the back foot compared to Lucien, but that is changing fast. My order has already formed an alliance with the Guardians of Armadyl and we have reached out to the Temple Knights as well.
textByHash.09cfa1ae716c5391fc5dbca6a2988c99d32b283b: Indeed. Never would I have expected to see the followers of three different gods unite in this way, but our differences mean little compared to the threat Lucien poses.
textByHash.e0c3b19ebde2161cac5c3875bc59cf83dc78616c: Yes. I am aware of many of your past feats. You have regularly fought against the evils of this world. I believe there is more to you than what happened with Lucien.
textByHash.bcab818e1fce885bb737b05113c28fe31844c635: Yes. You have opposed Lucien before, and you have shown that you have the skills needed to make a difference in this fight.
textByHash.95aedf70a819f54af144dd98b0bcda730a5ba4cb: Our spies have been trying to track Lucien for some time, but he is proving difficult to locate. However, he has been expanding his resources at a rapid rate. We might be able to take advantage of this.
textByHash.47dc4476fcfab6212a34d8ed5ac5232938b97ca7: He's been forming alliances with all manner of groups and individuals. Such a large collective is likely to have plenty of weak links for us to exploit.
textByHash.2cb325e91895a2bd5a3761afa2044e9757e4e4d9: With that in mind, we'd like you to investigate a treasure hunter by the name of Movario. We believe he has been working with Lucien for some time.
textByHash.8a9c662de0023297cdfee1f8539595dca06dcb92: He's magically trained, has adventured, and has spent a lot of time in various archives.
textByHash.0918f84d6c8fdec90789079eb85b80245cfb12b3: Indeed. We suspect that his combined magical and historical knowledge is highly valuable to Lucien. In fact, we believe that it was Movario who first tracked down the Staff of Armadyl for him.
textByHash.78b25ce71b89b0a3ea54db8c0e90d56bad419030: According to our spies, Movario has hired a member of the Khazard Army called Darve to act as his bodyguard. As such, I'd recommend you begin at the Fight Arena.
textByHash.3bacddcb631ad977eb3ab948ce47e241e0247837: He first became a person of interest after you stole the Staff of Armadyl. He was regularly sighted in the area around the Temple of Ikov in the days beforehand.
textByHash.7752ee64c63d559523293dfd5dfb0ccf64e0d94c: He first became a person of interest after the Staff of Armadyl was stolen. He was regularly sighted in the area around the Temple of Ikov in the days beforehand.
textByHash.8a3c8ec65b00b6299dc3335cbdb301ad5dfcfe16: Truth be told, we still don't have absolute confirmation that he is. However, few people have the skills needed to locate something like the Staff of Armadyl.
textByHash.218b48c0740812ab62811fa61934346c794c589d: He seems to have been researching something new of late. He's been sighted in many libraries all across the world.
textByHash.9285962ac323ff53934866a2fc1ba0b193852a46: We're not sure. His focus seems to be on the God Wars and the gods themselves. Saradomin and Guthix in particular.
textByHash.d38bdbe5280b0e80129f32c88fb5aba01dea3ffc: Given what happened with the Staff, our fear is that Lucien has him looking for more sources of godly power.
textByHash.e9b12b7e5c1242d3f9abfa358f20c8019ef671f1: Most of this information actually came from a single spy of ours. She obtained it by talking to Reldo of all people.
textByHash.15cb427e1d8103fbca0d276ea161c1b0526bb0bb: Yes, he's quite an interesting individual. Most of course know him as an accomplished scholar, but I've found that there's a lot more to him than first meets the eye...
textByHash.184844f532189c5a2d207f27511df93f1c47ab1d: At this point, I'm afraid not. From what we can tell, he's mostly operated alone until very recently. However, since acquiring the Staff of Armadyl, he's been forming quite the alliance of individuals.
textByHash.91ec61c8004e2629160a0492f8a99ee2f2f8542c: It is clear he's planning something. Something big. However, any attempts by our spies to locate him have resulted in violent ends at the hands of his new allies.
textByHash.9afb07f39219ddf28af0f6a201279e1f4dcc2b59: Right now they mostly seem to consist of various mercenaries and the like. However, given the resources he now has access to, we believe he's also allied with some larger organisations.
textByHash.755c419753afa7c1ed545a7c7c71efd0d5e48ee6: On top of that, there's also evidence to suggest he's been building an undead army somewhere in the Wilderness. There has been an increase in sightings of zombies and skeletons in the area.
textByHash.7417bebd7335813ed12607d1d645c8e41aaad34d: Nothing is confirmed and this point, but these undead seem to be specifically targeting our spies in the area.
textByHash.d96ab715493d31966cc2e66904550d46fcb58726: That is why I'm hoping that Movario will lead us to some answers.
textByHash.d6930ec10443d21b23d1c8d6a7375ce6e90bdcfe: We are a group who believe that too many of our fellow Guthixians have allowed themselves to become spellbound by the beauty of nature. The wider world is constantly at threat, but they no longer wish to see it.
textByHash.dab287c67bd017098f05ee3d6fd04b5e9fe4de92: Our organisation is still fairly new, and many of our members are on the younger side. However, we have the backing of many senior druids such as Sanfew and Kaqemeex.
textByHash.4a0296fcc53dc0d10b8225b4cecad41f4ec4d927: You are not wrong, my friend. I have no doubt that every member of our order would willing fight to the last drop of blood if the situation required it, but it is not where our strength lies.
textByHash.98dc00f9c93bf31e9b13dcda26a22c114bc98bd6: However, I do not see that as a bad thing. The world has no shortage of warriors and heroes, and our kingdoms have armies capable of standing against many a danger. Instead, we focus on what they often lack.
textByHash.72ecfdcbaa3c47bea9a35d91285f7d72554da462: One example is our spy network. While still not quite as extensive as that of the Temple Knights, we have many who are experts in moving around unseen. After all, no one suspects a druid.
textByHash.8d3e43733fbd5f2a53d4f0b2c922328ecafca4e9: Then of course you have our Herblore skills, which are second to none. We are constantly making new advancements that let us supply our allies with brews and potions for all manner of purposes.
textByHash.478f1e086d778870e20ee7889ceb39da2b7b3212: We're already putting many of these potions to the test in our fight against Lucien.
textByHash.4b9a9d494917e22ec73010c85b7fcb9c58966977: Welcome back. What news do you have?
textByHash.c47aa511e664cc533e17fe2b112428a7b5813e5a: Remember, we need you to investigate a treasure hunter by the name of Movario. Given that he hired a bodyguard from the Khazard Army, I'd recommend starting at the Fight Arena.
textByHash.2e852dca00c67cff1e1d6da7305a0ba0e6ad6cd1: Excellent work. I look forward to hearing the results.
textByHash.6a706723e08bfeb18137a0ae71102cb10d02042e: Excellent work. These notes are very useful, albeit rather concerning as well. I'll let you keep hold of them. You'll probably want to read them yourself, if you haven't already.
textByHash.c961013317c5888207e861a858044a05e25ef769: While you were gone, our negotiations with the Temple Knights continued. Given their nature, they weren't entirely convinced on joining our alliance initially, but it seems we managed to convince them.
textByHash.32ce293cb0fc77cc7884eb6df4a889aabc1a625f: As Taverley no longer seems to be safe, we've decided it best that we establish a base of operations for this new alliance at the White Knights' Castle in Falador.
textByHash.c29a9733f99ec439894377cc42f61227eabc40ed: I will be departing shortly, but I'd like you to head for the Temple of Ikov instead. We've lost contact with Idria and the Guardians of Armadyl.
textByHash.9a6a33db39e1f65a4c7f57aa76c2fa3ae34114f2: Hopefully it's no cause for concern, but given what happened here, I fear Lucien may be targeting them.
textByHash.fc52a9ac81a9a5e6fb7d58a60e58476d4b5faf0e: Head for the hidden entrance to the temple at McGrubor's Wood. Once you find Idria, send her to me at the White Knights' Castle and then join us there yourself. Good luck.
textByHash.d7701a59733f6e8b510b85c62275f48bb302768d: Hello there. I'll be departing for Falador shortly. You should head over to McGrubor's Wood as soon as you can. We need to make sure Idria and the Guardians of Armadyl are safe.
textByHash.524ce46134aa96f5747610589ef662560ec9645c: Ah, there you are. Idria told us what happened at McGrubor's Wood. I'm glad to see you made it here safely. Now, allow me to introduce Akrisae Kolluym of the Temple Knights.
textByHash.68061acb1842e2567585820d4bc2cfe4d8a51d9d: Anyway, now that we're all here, I think it's time we discussed the contents of the notes that found. To put it bluntly, these notes confirm all of our worst fears.
textByHash.9bb0e880251628f7911b6654e69004613f3e6161: It seems that Lucien is indeed attempting to follow in Zamorak's footsteps and attain godhood. The Staff of Armadyl was merely the first step in his plan, for he now seeks an even greater prize.
textByHash.fe5859e662259dc4a1869b6514ab347073312329: There is an artefact that history has long forgotten. One with a power unlike anything else ever seen in Gielinor. A power that even the gods themselves struggle to comprehend.
textByHash.9c97df46daf4b69d4465880597a764bfb1ac6e4b: Yes. The Eye of Saradomin is one name for this artefact, though it has had many others. For example, we in Crux Eqal know it as the Fist of Guthix. However, its real name is...
textByHash.6b53a42623d3130831cec954251a504536ed012c: Movario seems to think so, and he looks to have been right about everything else involving the Stone so far.
textByHash.0f523ae6f65d076f3ee5602f53cac96cafef8d2e: I agree, but unfortunately our spies have had little luck in finding him so far.
textByHash.818a2db5fc707d24a640e4b5b2cdd5f5ec6a3e97: I wonder if I might have a solution to that...
textByHash.a06f944449814c5e7dcdbcf4629c909943bf390f: According to Movario's notes, Lucien sent a pair of spies to keep an eye on him. If we can capture one of them, they might be able to lead us to him.
textByHash.bb51291c214bd4b8b6edf8beb100aa585cd6846e: That depends on how loyal they are. Most of Lucien's followers seem to be mere mercenaries so far, but he does have some true believers as well.
textByHash.df7cd5b67e373c3d9b9d274dbc1c6aaaab7ce66c: That said, we've recently managed to perfect a far more potent form of the traditional truth serum. I believe it should allow us to bypass any form of interrogating.
textByHash.080d18f099d146a6a5016518c8194ebb45d6d2d0: Provided Movario's notes are accurate, they should be somewhere in Draynor Village.
textByHash.9f936939407806f49a347350e98d36fb99e841f0: Hello there. If you need a hand with anything, you should talk to Akrisae.
textByHash.fbf84c2acc3a131dc7c94c2395a829a84af5447b: Not much to tell, really. I grew up in Taverley and spent most of my life around druids. It seemed only natural for me to join them, and ten years ago that's exactly what I did.
textByHash.e1bb73cc87d63773af2ca6db7548701153bfb0d7: After that, I travelled around most of Gielinor and saw tragedy and heartache, triumph and beauty.
textByHash.f232bed590a314c600aede70b2e71322dd681ca1: I came back with a feeling that many of my fellow druids were a bit too absorbed in local matters and not spending enough time looking at the larger picture.
textByHash.43f6c719d414f5e7d22529912ad5489398cc548c: Yes. It turns out I wasn't quite alone in my feelings. I found a few likeminded druids and Crux Eqal was formed.
textByHash.092e297652d64feda765e7e97b6573bf7b65a52b: Far more than most I suspect, but truth be told, that's still very little.
textByHash.8bb42379186981b5915014698431ab45ad190609: To us druids, it is known as the Fist of Guthix. It is a divine creation that allows one to unlock powers beyond what even the gods possess.
textByHash.ca9ec633f3f3333c0ae228c7578de4de6f3c719a: It was misused by many during the God Wars, so when Guthix awoke, he hid it away so that none would ever be able to steal its power for themselves.
textByHash.2acb31139213fc00a5cbbcf735ba948e0799cb62: No. That is a secret that only Guthix himself now knows. I hope it stays that way.
textByHash.e8ae737a5101cd1d7f4b0ac934cd7ca921cbf8c9: He is very capable, but he reminds me of some of the druids back home. The ones that ultimately led us to form Crux Eqal.
textByHash.5faac0066fd5a4c517a0c62f9d71eadb6d7e384f: He puts a lot of faith in his god. I don't necessarily fault that. As a loyal servant of Guthix, it would be very hypocritical of me to do so.
textByHash.d5119390e590e6c60cf528f612ffabc69c3e367c: But Saradomin is long gone from this world, along with all the other gods. As their followers, we must be prepared to act without their guidance.
textByHash.3ff9588abbcbbcc948d03cfcc05efbbc413b1908: It is hard to form an opinion on her. She is very secretive. However, I sense a great sadness in her. Many of her order have already fallen victim to Lucien. I suspect she feels personally responsible.
textByHash.451c6d9ca70827cc89e5bba4192ef5f58291bafe: I wonder if that in itself is something she feels conflicted over. Armadyl is a god of justice, not revenge. And yet, to lose those close to you...
textByHash.e6dd33799de41449bd0d41b9dfdee7cc29843908: I'm sure that Guthix had just as much of a role in this as anyone else did.
textByHash.3dac461489d5ab49e53bbbbf87b7edeb05ab94e8: Now, before we begin the interrogation... could I interest you in a refreshing beverage?
textByHash.ca3dc0c99b3be6af7024833c392190b88c948411: Yes, of course! We may have this man imprisoned, but we should still show some decorum!
textByHash.137ceece9789189b041e68b3fafa85598f947c56: I have one of my druids preparing you some fine juice as we speak.
textByHash.7bbebc35fa4d7cd11b80bd86e48cbdcde36843f0: Excellent! Now, if you could give it to our friend here...
textByHash.eb226d66e84f91e1dff75d1d06e540ef47d9dfc1: Someone get a healer over here, quickly!
textByHash.8eafb23c0b4b13561432ca329bc8ef1532581567: Well, that spy ruined what truth serum we had...
textByHash.977c2422cb3cc87cd57bbca5bb3accbb8e03a48a: We're not just using any old truth serum here, so the process is quite complex. Still, it should be doable.
textByHash.544fd62d7b1df1b6ef592d071c84453d9f5dd8ae: First, we'll need some enriched snapdragon. Betty in Port Sarim should be able to help with that. You'll just need to take her a regular snapdragon seed.
textByHash.f3c4393ec576eac69cc0fd01e73ddaf60f4f3d2d: Well I do have one that I suppose I could part with. Let me know if you want it. I can also teleport you to Port Sarim if you wish.
textByHash.a772272ad9956eb132fef92418ed238a422e92f9: Now, would you like me to teleport you to Port Sarim?
textByHash.773d56bf81c51b89f32308eb07302a060b3973f9: Hello again. You'll need to take a snapdragon seed to Betty in Port Sarim. I have one here if needed. I can also teleport you to Port Sarim if you wish.
textByHash.07603bd74cb02721be6031d4339615ddfb8d1970: Hello again. You'll need to take a snapdragon seed to Betty in Port Sarim. I can teleport you there if you wish.
textByHash.3690ec1d695ddf8246c348858a9353c29a0ccd5c: Hello again. Any luck with that snapdragon seed?
textByHash.688f84f2ea4910217427412f3bc1e8b6deab4e1b: We've prepared a patch to grow it in. It's on top of the western tower of the castle. Head up there and get the seed planted. After that, I think Idria has a task for you.
textByHash.0ed6215fb1fc4ccca5302ad4adeb8569998c6fad: Excellent! While we wait for it to grow, I think Idria has a task for you.
textByHash.6db49e8d6873a959e3099874d3c8262f68e39712: Hello again. I imagine that snapdragon seed will have grown by now. You should head on up and check on it.
textByHash.36c16a0d573e2e275ab54c20b759dd6d2568e1fe: Hello again. I imagine that snapdragon seed will have grown by now.
textByHash.3f6864e599c9bd914e69a612b8fb05574f69cab7: Excellent! I have a regular truth serum for you. Just add the herb to it and it should be ready to go. Given what happened before, it might be best if you administer it yourself this time.
textByHash.ee7800ba39b9c518a05fd235954770b0af33d153: Hello again. How are things going with that truth serum?
textByHash.eb18fcd3d8a57d44608548a23428d8c4df633d09: Well you should just need to add the enriched snapdragon to a regular truth serum. Given what happened before, it might be best if you administer it yourself this time.
textByHash.b192259fbd0f2be387e61380c98239ef617481fb: Excellent! Given what happened before, it might be best if you administer it yourself this time. Just head into the cell when you're ready.
textByHash.ce870c093ecfa00caa712d5f57df0f8c33804a10: Well if you need anything, I'm sure Akrisae can help.
textByHash.f3aa06face37f38a21e07552319da299fbb3f647: I suppose it makes sense that Lucien would work through a proxy. Still, this doesn't give us a lot to go on.
textByHash.02cf9fca4b7687de8f86ba3d6f1fdc645e5a53e7: Hello there. Akrisae was hoping to speak with you.
textByHash.241cf869f6c95282ebe500f7ffb62616af8a000b: It sounds like... footsteps? But really small ones...
textByHash.04c9fe0a2199b8ad44be504725e37468f0f41899: Do you have any idea what they're doing?
textByHash.fda6c027cdb18a96c3c729f6381dbc58c1fb28b7: Er... Sorry to interrupt, , but would you mind explaining who this is?
textByHash.d3304b89f57c6a69e60afbd146e9e70c535bd7ba: Ah, so you're Hazelmere! I've heard much about you!
textByHash.0e5bd3298f6ff35a134d6b3b0e1276df1a0ba2ab: Er... Sorry, I didn't quite catch that.
textByHash.73f48871d077179fab16b02c7042286ff6af7ce3: Right... I believe I need to make some introductions. If you'll excuse us...
textByHash.a02e9728701c86920eb4642e0a730a03c0b470b1: The Black Knights' Fortress? Could the Kinshra really have allied with Lucien?
textByHash.e581254a1ef2ba8eb1bd2a0fa0027b95942e139c: Well if you need any specific details, I'm sure Akrisae can help.
textByHash.e1c721504e205d297665a5f0402607de4bd5213f: So it's not just the Kinshra. Lucien has managed to ally with the Dagon'hai as well.
textByHash.212e12f00eb137d295a0df6ba18e13d91405323e: Well good luck. I have no doubt you'll be successful.
textByHash.984f4769eca181c7f1e1dc4f1eeab9b6325a3006: We thought we knew how powerful Lucien had become. We thought we'd prepared appropriately...
textByHash.c320bcff1f201cdfaf19d06f440e6c04dc6ca080: He could bring an end to this world without even trying!
textByHash.e065f5ed3b78f3b2c8d256ca45dea27fe94d9ea3: Nothing that we know of, but Movario has shown interest in the area before. He wouldn't be going back there now without good reason.
textByHash.a3d692fd9186765a24b7952ff621b6bdab98b859: If there's any chance that it is, then we must make sure he doesn't find it.
textByHash.8fdf4d8f9ec34ab8b8d9defdcbe905dfad3e6878: Good to see you. How are things going?
textByHash.87d219a25620fa4c2f3dd4b1274b5cf44b5d789e: Akrisae said he'd been seen in the Lumbridge Swamp Caves. There was mention of a large cavern filled with mysterious floating lights.
textByHash.1cd85c4f338af2694b95a65a6fd5644b46d85e50: Just remember, you'll need to disguise yourself as the Dark Squall. That should convince Movario that you're working with him.
textByHash.c20b19eb11433924265af4a76b1199ff9f4d1f43: Lucien will not be allowed to get away with his actions, my friend. We will stop him.
textByHash.93925899e168a46fa15ee5a64e2ef178ecb8316e: Revenge? No. However, I do believe in justice. I know some druids would even challenge that, but a world without justice is a world without balance.
textByHash.6a0e1b373ad75e77d7cfca287bb3aac8c90e9fb6: Lucien, and those like him, must be held accountable for their actions. It falls to people like us to ensure that happens. It's the only way the world will stay safe.
textByHash.a1779709d38e25d49d6abbfdbbbc060b60f68ef8: We will, my friend. With people like you fighting for our cause, Lucien has no hope.
textByHash.9d603bbe50925d86c75b2606ecd8820c582c37cc: You'd better get back there as soon as possible. We can't let Movario find the Stone.
textByHash.66f1dfd928fbde88809fff3691721462f8ae5dac: A Guthixian temple? This is concerning. You'd better get back there as soon as possible.
textByHash.9871f27ca3642dfdbea10c0461121cf50719169a: Well then you must get back there as soon as you can! We can't let Lucien get the Stone.
textByHash.33ea9e658b0ac4bbefc6ea960af2af3457870c42: , you must return to the temple below Lumbridge! Idria and her Guardians of Armadyl have already departed to support you!
textByHash.bca33325e9945b1bb07fb1bfe9245d6eaf3f736c: Then our worst fears have come to pass. The horrors that he could unleash with it...
textByHash.4525d8aaff00e61851e18aa1cefd54aa98636faf: As do we in Crux Eqal.
textByHash.40bcabe173dfabd8486386d125bbe946867dc145: Rest, my friend. You have well and truly earned it. We will take things from here.
textByHash.9e6416545b4969e89a55e39f63fdcd7d9fd85843: And the world will be safe once more.
textByHash.428983892463be2582068f6fd714056155938b5c: Ah, , it's good to see you again.
textByHash.4f9fb160aff0f00976efa98c8c0289b4e4ca05f1: Nothing yet, but we're doing everything we can to find him. I hope he's ready for us, because once we do locate him, we're going to give him quite the bloody nose...
textByHash.116d13d1cc115ae89c1e692978ae27bc7d11741f: ... or at least whatever passes for a nose on a Mahjarrat!
